title: Ship your first Managed Agent
summary: Anthropic's Managed Agents platform enables building incident-investigator agents through simple abstractions: Agent, Environment, and Session. The tutorial covers streaming events, custom tool integration, and deployment patterns for production use cases including subagents, vaults, and memory.
